name: McKay-Thompson series of class 3A for the Monster group with a(0) = 42.
formula: Expansion of (h + 27)^2 / h, where h = (eta(q) / eta(q^3))^12.
Expansion of 27 * (b(q)^3 + c(q)^3)^2 / (b(q) * c(q))^3 in powers of q where b(), c() are cubic AGM theta functions. - _Michael Somos_, Jun 16 2012
Expansion of (a(q) / (eta(q) * eta(q^3)))^6 in powers of q where a() is a cubic AGM theta function. - _Michael Somos_, Dec 01 2013
G.f. is a period 1 Fourier series which satisfies f(-1 / (3 t)) = f(t) where q = exp(2 Pi i t). - _Michael Somos_, Dec 01 2013
program: (PARI) {a(n) = my(A); if( n<-1, 0, n++; A = x * O(x^n); A = (eta(x^3 + A) / eta(x + A))^12; polcoeff( (1 + 27 * x * A)^2 / A, n))}; /* _Michael Somos_, Jun 16 2012 */
xref: Apart from constant term, same as A007243, A045480.
